n,G in ipairs({{-209286+209287;-854961-(-858453)};{-545020+545021,575652-572859};{-170805+173599;-641479+644971}})do while G[-269422-(-269423)]<G[-506742+506744]do local function n(n)return z[n+(-256498+300767)]end do local n=table.insert local G=string.sub local
